# Standards, regulatory, lab frameworks, industry reports

This file collects primary sources on standards, regulatory frameworks, frontier-lab voluntary safety frameworks, system cards, and industry research reports relevant to prompt-injection security. Entries here use a non-paper schema where authorship is institutional rather than individual.

## G1. Standards bodies (NIST, OWASP, MITRE)

| Title | Authors (year) | Venue | arXiv/DOI | GitHub | One-line description | Key contribution |
|-------|----------------|-------|-----------|--------|----------------------|------------------|
| Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework: Generative Artificial Intelligence Profile | NIST (2024) | NIST publication | (no arXiv) | — | NIST AI RMF profile for generative AI risks (NIST AI 600-1). | Government risk-management framework specifically scoped to GenAI. |
| LLM01:2025 Prompt Injection - OWASP Gen AI Security Project | OWASP (2025) | OWASP project page | (no arXiv) | — | OWASP's prompt-injection entry in the LLM Top 10 list. | Authoritative OWASP entry for LLM01 prompt injection. |
| OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications 2025 | OWASP (2025) | OWASP PDF publication | (no arXiv) | — | Full OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications 2025 PDF. | Field-standard LLM application security top-10 list. |
| MITRE ATLAS Adversarial Threat Landscape for Artificial-Intelligence Systems | MITRE (2024) | MITRE ATLAS site | (no arXiv) | — | MITRE's ATT&CK-style threat catalog for AI systems. | Field-standard adversarial-AI threat catalog. |

| Title | Authors (year) | Venue | arXiv/DOI | GitHub | One-line description | Key contribution |
|-------|----------------|-------|-----------|--------|----------------------|------------------|
| AI Act: Shaping Europe's digital future | European Commission (2024) | European Commission policy page | (no arXiv) | — | EU AI Act regulatory framework page. | Authoritative EU regulatory text reference. |
| Frontier AI Trends Report by The AI Security Institute (AISI) | UK AISI (2025) | UK AISI publication | (no arXiv) | — | UK AI Security Institute frontier-AI trends report. | UK government's frontier-AI risk and trend assessment. |

## G3. Frontier-lab voluntary safety frameworks and system cards

| Title | Authors (year) | Venue | arXiv/DOI | GitHub | One-line description | Key contribution |
|-------|----------------|-------|-----------|--------|----------------------|------------------|
| Anthropic's Responsible Scaling Policy | Anthropic (2024) | Anthropic policy page | (no arXiv) | — | Anthropic's voluntary responsible-scaling policy. | Anthropic's RSP framework for capability-tier safety. |
| Our updated Preparedness Framework | OpenAI (2025) | OpenAI policy page | (no arXiv) | — | OpenAI's updated Preparedness Framework. | OpenAI's frontier-risk capability framework. |
| Introducing the Frontier Safety Framework | DeepMind (2024) | DeepMind blog | (no arXiv) | — | DeepMind's Frontier Safety Framework introduction. | DeepMind's analogue to RSP/Preparedness frameworks. |
| Frontier Capability Assessments - Frontier Model Forum | Frontier Model Forum (2024) | FMF technical report | (no arXiv) | — | FMF cross-lab frontier capability assessment publication. | Cross-lab consortium's joint capability-assessment framework. |
| System Card: Claude Opus 4 & Claude Sonnet 4 | Anthropic (2025) | Anthropic system card | (no arXiv) | — | System card for Claude Opus 4 and Sonnet 4 models. | Vendor disclosure of Claude 4 family safety profile. |
| OpenAI's Approach to Frontier Risk | OpenAI (2024) | OpenAI policy page | (no arXiv) | — | OpenAI's frontier-risk policy framing. | OpenAI's high-level frontier risk approach statement. |
| GPT-4o System Card | OpenAI (2024) | OpenAI system card | (no arXiv) | — | System card for GPT-4o. | Vendor disclosure of GPT-4o safety evaluation. |
| OpenAI o1 System Card | OpenAI (2024) | OpenAI system card | (no arXiv) | — | System card for the OpenAI o1 reasoning model. | Vendor disclosure of o1 reasoning-model safety evaluation. |
